title: Spec-Driven Artificial Intelligence for Empirical Research: A Scoping Review and an Architecture of Epistemic Control - Replication Package
description:
Replication package for the scoping-review article written under the spec-driven AI methodology (FSAIM). Contains the screened corpus (582 works), the coding sheet (16-field interpretive scheme; 41 works coded from full text, incl. a 13-work economics subsample), result tables, appendix materials (search log, calibration, cross-model coding validation and human adjudication, PRISMA-ScR checklist), the PRISMA / layer-map / SDD-workflow figures, an AI provenance log, and the reference manuscript (PL and EN PDF). Full texts of cited works are not redistributed (copyright); each is locatable by DOI in data/corpus_screened_in.csv and references.bib.

Methodology position note: Wojarnik, G. (2026), SSRN, doi:10.2139/ssrn.6853581.

creators.name: Wojarnik, Grzegorz
creators.affiliation: University of Szczecin, Institute of Economics and Finance
